title: coating_porosity_histogram
signature: def coating_porosity_histogram(image_bgr: object, dark_threshold: int = 50) -> float
content: Estimates thermal spray coating porosity percentage from a BGR image by greyscale thresholding. Returns porosity as a float percentage 0-100.
code:
def coating_porosity_histogram(image_bgr, dark_threshold=50):
    import cv2
    import numpy as np
    gray = cv2.cvtColor(image_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)
    _, thresh = cv2.threshold(gray, dark_threshold, 255, cv2.THRESH_BINARY_INV)
    porosity = float(np.sum(thresh > 0)) / thresh.size * 100.0
    return round(porosity, 3)
